name: LinkedIn Profile Scraper
description: Scrape full LinkedIn personal profiles (experience, education, skills, languages) via CDP connection to authenticated Chrome + Voyager API. ScrapeLinkedIn API as fallback.
usage_notes: Requires Chrome running with --remote-debugging-port=9222 on the server, already logged into LinkedIn (manual VNC login). Optional: SCRAPELINKEDIN_API_KEY for fallback. Rate-limited to ~20 profiles/hour by default.

options.name: requests_per_hour
options.label: Profiles per hour
options.description: Rate limit for LinkedIn page loads. LinkedIn may flag above 50/hour. 20 is safe (~3 min between profiles).

options.name: mode
options.label: Scraping mode
options.description: bio = entity is a person, scrape their profile directly. company_people = entity is a company, scrape employee profiles from employee links.

options.name: max_profiles_per_entity
options.label: Max profiles per entity
options.description: Maximum personal profiles to scrape per entity (only used in company_people mode).

options.name: fallback_to_scrapelinkedin
options.label: ScrapeLinkedIn fallback
options.description: When Playwright/Voyager fails (cookie expired, CAPTCHA), try ScrapeLinkedIn API ($0.01/profile) as fallback. Requires SCRAPELINKEDIN_API_KEY env var.
